creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
The brilliant people at Google closed my issue because:

1) The command works in their environment, oblivious to the fact that the issue is platform-specific, even though I mentioned that in the bug description.

2) They suggest that I need "more in-depth analysis" if I'm still facing the issue, oblivious to the fact that I had already root-caused it and provided a patch.

I can't reopen the bug, so I filed a new one, and updated the URL here.
